subcodes.first_line: O thou observer of the divine Kingdom! Be thou enraptured and enamored in the path of Truth, and in the way of God be thou bare and without head [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی در سبیل حق واله و شیدا باش و در راه خدا برهنه و بی سر و
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
